heading: Design + build
content: Your website designed and coded by the same person. I design in Figma first — you'll see exactly what you're getting, and can click through a working prototype before I build anything. Then I code it on whatever suits your business best: WordPress if you want to manage content yourself, or a modern lightweight setup if speed and low maintenance matter more.

heading: Branding that carries across
content: Logo, colours, and a look that works everywhere — your website, your socials, your signage, your invoices.

heading: Quick visuals when you need them
content: Mockups and clickable prototypes, turned around fast. Handy when you're pitching something new, testing an idea before committing to it, or need a change before Friday.

heading: Fixing and improving existing sites
content: Not everything needs a rebuild. Whether it's a WordPress site that's gotten slow or a design that's showing its age, I'll tell you honestly if it needs a refresh or a restart.
